programs.name: news-brief
programs.description: Fetch top Hacker News stories and summarize to Telegram
programs.author: cssmith615

programs.name: daily-standup
programs.description: Generate a daily standup summary from recent logs and send to Slack
programs.author: cssmith615
programs.program:
RECALL.recent(limit=10) ->
GEN.standup(format="What was done, what's next, any blockers", tone=concise) ->
OUT.slack

programs.name: price-alert
programs.description: Fetch a product price and alert via Telegram if below threshold
programs.author: cssmith615
programs.program:
FETCH.price(src=$url) ->
EVAL.threshold(value=$price, min=$threshold) ->
IF.$below_threshold ->
  OUT.telegram(msg="Price drop alert: $price")

programs.name: weekly-digest
programs.description: Aggregate data from multiple sources and send a weekly digest
programs.author: cssmith615
programs.program:
PAR(
  FETCH.data(src=$source1),
  FETCH.data(src=$source2)
) ->
MERGE ->
CLN.null ->
SUMM.text(max=500) ->
GEN.digest(format=weekly, tone=professional) ->
OUT.telegram

programs.name: github-issues-brief
programs.description: Fetch open GitHub issues for a repo and summarize to Slack
programs.author: cssmith615
programs.program:
FETCH.data(src="https://api.github.com/repos/$owner/$repo/issues?state=open&per_page=10") ->
XFRM.pluck(field=title) ->
XFRM.join(sep="\n") ->
GEN.summary(context="GitHub open issues", tone=concise) ->
OUT.slack

programs.name: weather-brief
programs.description: Fetch weather for a city and send a daily morning brief
programs.author: cssmith615
programs.program:
FETCH.data(src="https://wttr.in/$city?format=j1") ->
XFRM.pluck(field=current_condition) ->
GEN.brief(format="Weather brief for $city", tone=friendly) ->
OUT.telegram

programs.name: x-post-daily
programs.description: Generate and post a daily tweet about a topic in a cool developer voice
programs.author: cssmith615
programs.program:
GEN.post(topic=$topic, tone="cool, direct, developer-friendly, not AI-sounding", max=280) ->
OUT.x

programs.name: slack-webhook-responder
programs.description: Respond to incoming Slack webhook events with a generated reply
programs.author: cssmith615
programs.program:
LOAD.context ->
GEN.reply(input=$event.text, context=$context, tone=helpful) ->
SET.context(persist=true) ->
OUT.slack(msg=$reply)
